A place where you can stop to rest, eat, stretch your legs, and then continue your journey. A beautiful, peaceful, and safe grove.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar descansar.. comer... limpieza.. atención de todo el personal...paramos a comer y pasar la noche en motorhome.. seria ideal tomas d 220 disponibles para casos como el nuestro. La gente muy dispuesta y amable c nosotros.. variedad en Shop y comidas... rápida atencion y muy buena calidad

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and rest, eat, and enjoy the cleanliness and attentive service from all the staff. We stopped for lunch and to spend the night in our motorhome. It would be ideal to have 220V outlets available for situations like ours. The people were very helpful and friendly. There was a good variety of shops and food, and the service was fast and of very good quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUeTk3NURREAE
